pii_handling.known_limitation: ticket_key is per_run for ALL surfaces when PII redaction is on (the engine salts every principal — including Azure resource IDs — with a per-run secret).  Cross-run deduplication is unsafe under this mode.  Engine tenant-stable salting is deferred to #73; until then, run with --no-pii-redaction or accept that re-runs will produce duplicate tickets.
